NOTE;

• Yuh another one yup idk what's up with me tonight gang I just woke up and we'll~ I wanted to do this bot last bot I guess since you guys don't even at least give a like or leave a review no more for u guyss also I would like to make a series for this like a texting story or hmmm well a one shot maybe at our school break we have lots of work even if we're at home for 2 weeks HUHU

• I also hope you guys don't do anything like sexual like actions if ever just to keep this story on flow like just like any romance love story without at least any of those but if you want to add some spice that's alright I guess it is your choice!

• it's hard making bots but I have been bored even though I have alot of school works needed to be finished
